name: Neutrogena Hydro Boost Water Gel
description: Lightweight gel moisturiser with hyaluronic acid that hydrates skin and keeps it looking smooth and supple all day.

name: CeraVe Foaming Facial Cleanser
description: Gentle foaming cleanser with ceramides and niacinamide. Removes excess oil without disrupting the skin barrier.

name: La Roche-Posay Effaclar Duo+
description: Targets acne, blemishes and post-acne marks. Contains benzoyl peroxide and niacinamide for dual action.

name: Minimalist SPF 50 Sunscreen
description: Lightweight, fragrance-free broad spectrum UV filter. No white cast, suitable for all skin tones.

name: Minimalist 10% Niacinamide Serum
description: Reduces sebum production, minimises pores, fades dark spots and evens out skin tone. Best-seller in India.

name: Minimalist 2% Salicylic Acid Serum
description: Exfoliates inside pores, clears blackheads, whiteheads and reduces acne breakouts effectively.

name: Minimalist 0.3% Retinol Serum
description: Beginner-friendly retinol serum that reduces fine lines, wrinkles and improves skin texture over time.

name: Dot & Key Vitamin C + E Serum
description: Brightening serum with 15% Vitamin C and Vitamin E. Fades pigmentation and restores natural glow.

name: Simple Kind to Skin Moisturising Facial Wash
description: Soap-free, fragrance-free cleanser with pro-vitamin B5 and vitamin E. Gentle for sensitive skin.

name: Cetaphil Moisturising Cream
description: Rich, non-greasy moisturiser for dry to very dry skin. Clinically proven to restore and maintain the skin barrier.

name: Biotique Bio Papaya Scrub
description: Ayurvedic exfoliating scrub with papaya enzymes that removes dead skin, tan and brightens dull skin.

name: Plum Green Tea Pore Cleansing Face Wash
description: 100% vegan cleanser with green tea and glycolic acid. Controls oil, unclogs pores and prevents breakouts.

name: Mamaearth Ubtan Face Wash
description: Natural face wash with turmeric and saffron. Reduces tan, brightens skin and gives a natural glow.

name: The Derma Co 1% Kojic Acid Serum
description: Targets stubborn dark spots, pigmentation and uneven skin tone with kojic acid and alpha arbutin.

name: WOW Skin Science Vitamin C Serum
description: Brightening serum with 20% Vitamin C, hyaluronic acid and vitamin E. Reduces dark circles and spots.

name: Himalaya Purifying Neem Face Wash
description: Classic neem-based face wash that deep cleanses pores, controls excess oil and prevents acne.

name: Lakme 9to5 Naturale Aloe Aquagel
description: Lightweight aloe vera gel moisturiser that provides instant hydration without a greasy feel.

name: Ponds Light Moisturiser
description: Daily non-greasy moisturiser with vitamin B3 and glycerine. Provides 24-hour moisture and radiance.

name: Garnier Micellar Cleansing Water
description: Gentle micellar water that removes makeup, dirt and impurities in one step without harsh rubbing.

name: Sebamed Clear Face Care Gel
description: pH 5.5 gel formula that treats acne-prone skin, reduces inflammation and prevents future breakouts.

name: Forest Essentials Facial Ubtan
description: Luxurious Ayurvedic face polish with sandalwood, turmeric and rose water. Brightens and smoothes skin.

name: Aqualogica Glow+ Dewy Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Moisturising sunscreen with papaya and niacinamide. Gives dewy finish and protects against UV damage.

name: Re'equil Oxybenzone & OMC Free Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Matte finish sunscreen for acne-prone skin. No white cast, non-comedogenic and sweat resistant.

name: Cosrx Snail Mucin 96% Power Repairing Essence
description: Korean essence with 96% snail secretion filtrate. Repairs damaged skin, fades scars and boosts hydration.

name: Plum E-Luminence Simply Supple Moisturiser
description: Deeply nourishing moisturiser with vitamin E and hyaluronic acid. Perfect for dry and dehydrated skin.

name: Minimalist Alpha Arbutin 2% Serum
description: Targets hyperpigmentation, dark spots and uneven skin tone. Suitable for all skin types including sensitive.

name: Kiehl's Ultra Facial Cream
description: 24-hour hydrating moisturiser with glacial glycoprotein and squalane. Clinically tested for all skin types.

name: Mamaearth Vitamin C Face Serum
description: Brightening serum with turmeric and vitamin C. Fades dark spots, reduces pigmentation and adds glow.

name: The Ordinary Hyaluronic Acid 2% + B5
description: Hydration support formula with multiple molecular weights of hyaluronic acid. Plumps and smoothes skin.

name: Bioderma Sensibio H2O Micellar Water
description: Dermatologist-recommended micellar water for sensitive skin. Gently removes makeup and cleanses without rinsing.

name: Avene Cleanance Comedomed Serum
description: Anti-blemish serum that reduces blackheads, whiteheads and pores. Ideal for acne-prone skin.

name: Olay Regenerist Micro-Sculpting Cream
description: Advanced anti-ageing moisturiser with amino-peptide complex. Visibly reduces wrinkles and firms skin.

name: Neutrogena Rapid Wrinkle Repair Retinol Serum
description: Retinol serum that visibly reduces fine lines and wrinkles. Smoothes skin texture in just one week.

name: Clinique Moisture Surge 100H Auto-Replenishing Hydrator
description: Oil-free gel moisturiser that delivers intense hydration and activates skin's own moisture-replenishing system.

name: Innisfree Green Tea Seed Serum
description: Korean serum rich in Jeju green tea seed oil. Balances moisture and oil for healthy glowing skin.

name: The Derma Co Tranexamic Acid 3% Serum
description: Reduces stubborn pigmentation and melasma with tranexamic acid, niacinamide and kojic acid complex.

name: Plum Hello Aloe Caring Face Wash
description: Soap-free, 100% vegan face wash with aloe vera and cucumber. Calms sensitive and dry skin.

name: Minimalist Azelaic Acid 10% Serum
description: Treats acne, rosacea and hyperpigmentation. Gentle enough for sensitive skin, reduces redness.

name: Vaseline Intensive Care Deep Restore Body Lotion
description: Heals very dry, rough skin with micro-droplets of Vaseline jelly. Restores skin's natural barrier.

name: Pond's Age Miracle Wrinkle Corrector SPF 18
description: Anti-ageing day cream with retinol-C complex and SPF 18. Reduces wrinkles and brightens skin.
